ROOM 624 JUDGE LITTLE, LAURA ESPINOSA, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. JURY DELIBERATIONS CONT'D FROM YESTERDAY. ALL PARTIES, COUNSEL PRESENT. ALL JURORS PRESENT, EXCEPT THE 2 WHO ARE ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. JURY RETURNED TO COURT WITH THE FOLLOWING VERDICTS. ON PLTF'S COMPLAINT, VERDICT WAS FOR THE DEFT, ON THE DEFT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT, VERDICT WAS FOR CROSS-DEFT. CLERK READ THE VERICT, JURY POLLED AT DEFT'S REQUEST. JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED. REMAINDER OF JURY DUTY EXCUSED BY COURT. ALL EXHIBITS INCLUDING THE DEPOSITIONS RETAINED BY COURT EXCEPT THE TV (WHICH WAS TAKEN BY MR. JONATHAN) AND KEPT IN THE EXHIBIT CLOSET OF ROOM 624. BY CLERK.
